questions.a1: DazLng is a platform that allows you to learn languages in an interactive and personalized way.
questions.a2: We currently offer English, Spanish, German, and French.
questions.q3: How much does the subscription cost?
questions.a3: We offer different plans tailored to your needs, starting from $9.99/month.
